rulings.Case Title: CAITLIN FITTING et al VS. PAUL KRAAIJVANGER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Motion For Order Deeming January 16, 2014 Attorneys Fees Award Satisfied By Offset (Courts Release Of Funds) Or Other Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, April 25, 2016, Line 2 ( Part 2 of 5). DEFENDANT PAUL KRAAIJVANGER, REAL EQUITY GROUP ONE, LLC Defendants Motion For Order Deeming January 16, 2014 Attorneys Fees Award Satisfied By Offset (Courts Release Of Funds) Or Other Order Defendant's Motion for Order Deeming January 16, 2014 Attorney's Fees Award to be deemed awarded as attorney's fees on appeal is DENIED. The $10,600 was used to satisfy the awards ordered in 2012 and 2013. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CAITLIN FITTING et al VS. PAUL KRAAIJVANGER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Plaintiffs' Motion For An Order To Charge Paul Kraaijvanger'S Interest In Real Equity Group One, Llc, And Gemini Partners, Llc
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, April 25, 2016, Line 2 ( Part 3 of 5). PLAINTIFF CAITLIN FITTING Notice Of Motion And Plaintiffs' Motion For An Order To Charge Paul Kraaijvanger'S Interest In Real Equity Group One, Llc, And Gemini Partners, Llc is GRANTED. Any distributions from the LLCs to judgment debtor shall be paid to the judgment creditor. Corp. Code. 17705.03. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CAITLIN FITTING et al VS. PAUL KRAAIJVANGER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, April 25, 2016, Line 2 ( Part 4 of 5). PLAINTIFF CAITLIN FITTING Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Monetary Sanctions is DENIED, premature. Defendant's obligation to respond was stayed by February 25, 2016 order. The stay has now been lifted and Defendant is to respond to discovery within 10 days of notice of this order. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CAITLIN FITTING et al VS. PAUL KRAAIJVANGER et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, April 25, 2016, Line 2 ( Part 5 of 5). rulings.Case Title: CAITLIN FITTING et al VS. PAUL KRAAIJVANGER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Modify Or Extinguish The Courts February 25, 2016 Stay Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, April 25, 2016, Line 2 ( Part 1 of 5). PLAINTIFF CAITLIN FITTING, GLORIA GUTIERREZ, EDWARDO GUTIERREZ Notice Of Motion And Motion To Modify Or Extinguish The Courts February 25, 2016 Stay Order is moot. February 25, 2016 stay was lifted by its own terms on April 7, 2016 by Judge Crompton's order. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARIA L. MASTER VS. TAN ZI MING ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, April 25, 2016, Line 3. PLAINTIFF MARIA MASTER, CONSTATINA MASTER MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is continued to May 13, 2013. Defendant's substantive opposition shall be filed and personally or electronically served no later than April 26, 2016 by 4:00 pm. Reply, if any, shall be filed and served no later than May 9, 2016. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALBERT H. WONG VS. BAYVIEW LOAN SERVICING ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, April 25, 2016, Line 4. DEFENDANT BAYVIEW LOAN SERVICING, LLC DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to May 12, 2016. Moving party is ordered to comply with SLFR 2.7B an dprovide courtesy copy of the moving papers and the operative complaint to department 501 no later than May 2, 2016 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than May 2, 2016 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LOURDES REYES VS. ROLANDO BAUTISTA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, April 25, 2016, Line 5. DEFENDANT ROLANDO BAUTISTA Notice Of Motion To Compel is OFF CALENDAR, moot. Demurrer to First Amended Complaint sustained on April 1, 2016. There are no operative pleadings on file in this case. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANNA HONG VS. VINCENT G. REYES
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, April 25, 2016, Line 7. DEFENDANT VINCENT REYES MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden and showed failure to comply with CCP 1661(2) requirements. Opposing party failed to cite any authority in support of its argument and failed to produce evidence to create a triable issue of fact as to why "3 Day notice" is not defective. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHNNY VU VS. RUSHI BHANDERI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, April 25, 2016, Line 9. DEFENDANT RUSHI BHANDERI DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Notice is sufficient to support unlawful detainer based on allegations set forth in the complaint, specifically in paragraph 5. =(501/REQ)
